title: astragalus arequipensis
intro: Astragalus arequipensis, also known as Peruvian milk vetch, is a plant species in the legume family that is native to Peru. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as improving immune function, reducing stress and fatigue, and possibly lowering blood sugar levels. Astragalus arequipensis can be prepared as an herbal supplement in capsule or tablet form, or as a tea, to be used in traditional medicine.
